overview: Shree Vishwakarma Library is a complete library management platform for admins and students. It features real-time 50-seat tracking, student enrollment with printable receipts, revenue analytics, two-way messaging, notice board, motivational quotes, and a full admin dashboard — all in English.
features: Real-time 50-seat grid showing Available (green) and Occupied (red with student name)
Student enrollment with name, mobile, seat, fees (cash/online), address, father name, auto 30-day expiry, printable receipt
Admin dashboard with login, expiring membership alerts, and full student management
Detailed revenue reports with daily bar charts, monthly view, and cash vs online breakdown
Two-way messaging: students send support messages, admin replies and broadcasts announcements
Motivational quotes section with admin management
Settings panel to update admin credentials and library information
Library details displayed in info boxes
